title: Petalostemon adenopodus
taxonomy: Petalostemon adenopodus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is native to North America and is a part of the genus Petalostemon, which consists of about 10 species. Petalostemon adenopodus is a perennial herb that is known for its distinctive flowers and growth habits. The classification of Petalostemon adenopodus is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperms, and the order Fabales.
